recommendations.title: Elevator
recommendations.overview: Nine people are stuck in an elevator. One of them has a ticking bomb that can't be defused. The other eight will do anything to survive. There is no escape and no promise of rescue. As the tension in the elevator mounts the unthinkable soon becomes t

recommendations.title: World Trade Center
recommendations.overview: Two police officers struggle to survive when they become trapped beneath the rubble of the World Trade Center on September 11, 2001.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: Three people from different walks of life find themselves trapped inside a stalled elevator. What at first seems like an inconvenience rapidly escalates into a nightmare.

recommendations.title: The Walk
recommendations.overview: The story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's attempt to cross the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in 1974.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: My Winnipeg
recommendations.overview: The geographical dead center of North America and the beloved birthplace of Guy Maddin, Winnipeg, is the frosty and mysterious star of Maddin’s film. Fact, fantasy and memory are woven seamlessly together in this work, conjuring a city as delightful

recommendations.title: The Place
recommendations.overview: The fates of an apparently random group of strangers who each come into contact with a mysterious figure who they believe possesses the power to grant any wish, in return for which they must carry out a task he assigns them.

recommendations.title: Dark Floors
recommendations.overview: A man emerges with his autistic daughter and three others from a hospital elevator to find themselves trapped in the building with devilish monsters.

recommendations.title: Cube
recommendations.overview: A group of strangers find themselves trapped in a maze-like prison. It soon becomes clear that each of them possesses the peculiar skills necessary to escape, if they don't wind up dead first.

recommendations.title: Merry Kissmas
